limitations: Metadata and raw files are not pack-level proof.
Raw files are not candidate-ranking evidence.
Measured values are usable only after parser and unit checks pass.
Do not commit raw large files unless Git LFS is explicitly configured.

records.limitations: Raw file is approved source material, but measured values become usable only after hash verification, parser validation, unit checks, and explicit cell-level boundary tagging.
